response.justification: Strong senior engineer with broad full-stack, Linux, open-source, and architecture exposure across 15+ years, plus relevant Dlang/Node/TypeScript experience and a founder role at GISCollective. However, the resume shows individual-contributor seniority rather than explicit Head of Development/leadership track record, no clear UML or formal architecture-design deliverables, and—most critically—German is listed as 'Basic' against a hard C1 requirement. Worth a screening call to verify leadership scope and current German level, but the language gap likely disqualifies.
strengths: Deep multi-stack engineering background with strong open-source and Linux orientation
Founder of GISCollective shows architecture ownership and long-term product stewardship
Track record of mentoring via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course delivery
concerns: German listed as Basic, role requires minimum C1
No explicit people-management or Head/Tech-Lead title with team-leadership responsibilities
UML and formal requirements-management experience not evidenced
